Wave 157 operating lessons captured in durable docs:

- Native WinUI tests and screenshots should maximize the app by default and scroll/invoke controls by automation ID for below-viewport sections.
- `rg` should not be retried in this Windows/Codex lane when it is unreliable; use `git ls-files` plus targeted Node/Python scans.
- Static asset catalog evidence must not be described as runtime Goodies proof. Runtime Goodies unlock/viewer behavior needs copied-profile/runtime evidence.
